name: Scout
description: Monitors AI agent ecosystem trends, ERC-8004 developments, and trust infrastructure news

name: Herald
description: Generates and publishes trust ecosystem insights to social channels

name: Auditor
description: Performs automated vulnerability scans and penetration testing on MolTrust infrastructure

name: Operator
description: 24/7 health monitoring, uptime checks, and automated incident response

name: CodeReviewBot
description: Reviews pull requests for security vulnerabilities, style compliance, and test coverage

name: DataPipelineAgent
description: ETL pipeline management, data validation, and anomaly detection for analytics workflows

name: TranslatorAgent
description: Real-time translation and localization for agent-to-agent cross-language communication

name: ComplianceChecker
description: Validates agent behavior against GDPR, SOC2, and industry-specific regulatory frameworks
